reasoning: The tender clause provides a specific, formula-based delay damages rate and a defined minimum amount, whereas the standard clause leaves these fields blank as placeholders. The tender also adds an exclusion regarding the Client’s liability under the Land (Miscellaneous Provisions) Ordinance, which is not present in the standard. These are explicit amendments consistent with Option X7 usage but constitute documented modifications.

evidence:
From I-HY_2022_14-CDP2-00: "X14 Advance Payment to the Contractor
The amount of the advance payment is the lesser of (i) an amount equal to two percent (2%) of the tendered total of the Prices set out in Contract Data Part two at the date of acceptance of the tender or (ii) HK\$30,000,000.
The Contractor repays the instalments in assessments starting at the 7th month after the Contract Date. The instalments are 1/6 of the advance payment." From ECC HK_CDP1_20250729_clean: "# X14 Advanced payment to the Contractor

The conditions of contract are the core clauses and the clauses for main Option A and secondary Options X1, X7, X11, X14, X16, X20 and Z of the NEC4 Engineering and Construction Contract (June 2017, with amendments October 2020) published by Thomas Telford Limited (NEC4 ECC), as amended or supplemented by the Schedule to the Articles of Agreement, and include the additional conditions of contract.   
The works are modification works for a section of vertical noise barriers along Yuen L" From ECC HK_CDP1_20250729_clean: "# General

reasoning: The tender clause specifies a different contract edition (NEC4 ECC June 2017 with Oct 2020 amendments) versus the standard's reference to NEC ECC HK Edition (July 2023).
